languages.text: Remove {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Sluggish{/g}, gain {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Twitchy{/g} and {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Sluggish{/g} no longer disables dodging for 1 round. After the effect ends, gain {g|f:866cb491aeda45869e40a9165447a7cc}Staggered{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text: Remove {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Sluggish{/g}, gain {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Twitchy{/g} and {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Sluggish{/g} no longer disables dodging for 1 round. languages.text:
The {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect is removed, and the user gains the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.
For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect does not cause the user to automatically fail to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}.
After 1 round, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
The {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect is removed, and the user gains the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.
For 1 round, the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect does not cause the user to automatically fail to dodge.
After 1 round, the user suffers {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}.

After 1 round, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} until the end of combat.

The {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect is removed, and the user gains the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.

languages.text:
Эффект {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}инерционный откат{/g} снимается, и обладатель аугмента получает эффект {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}кинетическое ускорение{/g}.
В течение 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g} эффект {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}инерционный откат{/g} не вызывает автоматический провал {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонения{/g}.
Через 1 раунд обладатель аугмента становится {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}ошеломлен{/g} до конца боя.
languages.original_text:
The {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect is removed, and the user gains the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.
For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect does not cause the user to automatically fail to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}.
After 1 round, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
Эффект {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}инерционный откат{/g} снимается, и обладатель аугмента получает эффект {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}кинетическое ускорение{/g}.
В течение 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g} эффект {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}инерционный откат{/g} не вызывает автоматический провал {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонения{/g}.
Через 1 раунд обладатель аугмента получает эффект {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}покалеченная нога{/g}.

Эффект {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}инерционный откат{/g} снимается, и обладатель аугмента получает эффект {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}кинетическое ускорение{/g}.
В течение 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g} эффект {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}инерционный откат{/g} не вызывает автоматический провал {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонения{/g}.
Через 1 раунд обладатель аугмента получает эффект {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}покалеченная нога{/g}.

languages.text:
Se elimina el efecto {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}retroceso inercial{/g} y el usuario gana el efecto {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}aceleración cinética{/g}.
Durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, el efecto {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}retroceso inercial{/g} no provoca que el usuario falle automáticamente al {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivar{/g}.
Al cabo de 1 asalto, el usuario queda {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}desequilibrado{/g} hasta el final del combate.
languages.original_text:
The {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect is removed, and the user gains the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.
For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect does not cause the user to automatically fail to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}.
After 1 round, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
Se elimina el efecto {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}retroceso inercial{/g} y el usuario gana el efecto {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}aceleración cinética{/g}.
Durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, el efecto {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}retroceso inercial{/g} no provoca que el usuario falle automáticamente al {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivar{/g}.
Al cabo de 1 asalto, el usuario queda {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}desequilibrado{/g} hasta el final del combate.

languages.text:
{g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Trägheitsrückschlag{/g} wird entfernt und der Nutzer erhält den Effekt {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Kinetische Beschleunigung{/g}.
1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang sorgt {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Trägheitsrückschlag{/g} nicht dafür, dass {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Ausweichen{/g} des Nutzers automatisch fehlschlägt.
Nach 1 Runde wird der Nutzer bis zum Ende des Kampfes mit {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Taumelnd{/g} belegt.
languages.original_text:
The {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect is removed, and the user gains the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.
For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect does not cause the user to automatically fail to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}.
After 1 round, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
{g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Trägheitsrückschlag{/g} wird entfernt und der Nutzer erhält den Effekt {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Kinetische Beschleunigung{/g}.
1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang sorgt {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Trägheitsrückschlag{/g} nicht dafür, dass {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Ausweichen{/g} des Nutzers automatisch fehlschlägt.
Nach 1 Runde wird der Nutzer bis zum Ende des Kampfes mit {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Taumelnd{/g} belegt.

languages.text:
{g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Eylemsiz geri tepme{/g} etkisi ortadan kaldırılır ve kullanıcı, {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetik hızlanma{/g} etkisi kazanır.
{g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Eylemsiz geri tepme{/g} etkisi, 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rauntluğuna{/g} kullanıcının otomatik {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} başarısızlığına sebep olmaz.
Kullanıcı, 1 raunt sonra {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}afallar{/g}. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.
languages.original_text:
The {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect is removed, and the user gains the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.
For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect does not cause the user to automatically fail to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}.
After 1 round, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
{g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Eylemsiz geri tepme{/g} etkisi ortadan kaldırılır ve kullanıcı, {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetik hızlanma{/g} etkisi kazanır.
{g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Eylemsiz geri tepme{/g} etkisi, 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rauntluğuna{/g} kullanıcının otomatik {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} başarısızlığına sebep olmaz.
Kullanıcı, 1 raunt sonra {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}afallar{/g}. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.

languages.text:
L'effet {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Recul inertiel{/g} se dissipe et l'utilisateur bénéficie d'{g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Accélération cinétique{/g}.
Pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, il n'est pas soumis à l'échec automatique de ses {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquives{/g} induit par {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Recul inertiel{/g}.
Après 1 round, il subit l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Sidération{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat.
languages.original_text:
The {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect is removed, and the user gains the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.
For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect does not cause the user to automatically fail to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}.
After 1 round, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
L'effet {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Recul inertiel{/g} se dissipe et l'utilisateur bénéficie d'{g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Accélération cinétique{/g}.
Pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, il n'est pas soumis à l'échec automatique de ses {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquives{/g} induit par {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Recul inertiel{/g}.
Après 1 round, il subit l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Sidération{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat.

languages.text:
移除{g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}惯性反冲{/g}效果，并让使用者获得{g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}动能加速{/g}效果。
1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}内，{g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}惯性反冲{/g}效果不会导致使用者{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}自动失败。
1轮后，使用者陷入{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}恐慌{/g}状态，持续至战斗结束。
languages.original_text:
The {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect is removed, and the user gains the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.

After 1 round, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
移除{g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}惯性反冲{/g}效果，并让使用者获得{g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}动能加速{/g}效果。
1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}内，{g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}惯性反冲{/g}效果不会导致使用者{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}自动失败。
1轮后，使用者陷入{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}恐慌{/g}状态，持续至战斗结束。

languages.text:
{g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}慣性反動{/g}効果が除去され、使用者は{g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}運動加速{/g}効果を得る。
1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間、{g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}慣性反動{/g}効果は使用者を{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}に自動的に失敗させない。
1ラウンド後、使用者は戦闘終了まで{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}よろめき{/g}状態になる。

1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間、{g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}慣性反動{/g}効果は使用者を{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}に自動的に失敗させない。
1ラウンド後、使用者は戦闘終了まで{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}よろめき{/g}状態になる。
